ggable , DebugListener , Derivable , Executable , Instantiable , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Nameable , java.io.Serializable, TypedActor public class LampController extends Sender This x10 actor will broadcast lamp module commands to the X10

tor will broadcast lamp module commands to the X10 network based on the inputs that are provided when it fires. A lamp module is an x10 device that can turn a lamp on and off or control a lamp's brightness level. This is a specialized x10 broadcas

ightness level. This is a specialized x10 broadcaster actor that will only transmit the following commands: Bright : Set a lamp module's brightness level. Dim : Set a lamp module's dimness level. Off : Turn off a lamp module. On : Turn on a lamp mod

: Turn off a lamp module. On : Turn on a lamp module. Since: Ptolemy II 4.0 Version: $Id: LampController.java,v 1.10 2004/04/13 03:10:29 cxh Exp $ Author: Colin Cochran and Edward A. Lee See Also: Serialized Form Accepted Rating: Yellow (ptolemy) Pr

command on the X10 network depending on the input values. If bright or dim provide values outside the range 0 to 100, inclusive, or if there is no input, then no BRIGHT or DIM command is issued. If off or on are provided with a true input, th

. If off or on are provided with a true input, then issue an OFF or ON command. Normally it is not useful to provide more than one of these commands per firing, but this actor will happily issue the commands if that is what is requested. Speci

the commands if that is what is requested. Specified by: fire in interface Executable Overrides: fire in class Sender Throws: IllegalActionException - If reading from the ports fails. Overview Package Class Tree Deprecated Index Help PREV CLASS NEX
